name: My Decaying Heart (Aberrant Pursuit)
description:
This was first a Decaying Winter bot I had as a persona. But now I have turned this into a small chat focused around Archeximus creations.

I added some other users OC´s and characters in this bot, most of them I found while playing DW or anomalous activities.

Characters:
